You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile Education and Qualification: Ph.D. Work Experience: S.No. Designation Institute Year 1 Assistant Professor SGSITS Indore 2006 to Sep 2019 2 Associate Professor SGSITS Indore Sep 2019 to till date Research Details: Research Area: Computing and programming, Computer network, Wireless Communication, Cooperative Communication, mobile communication, Digital Communication, Energy Harvesting, and IOT, Machine learning.
